title: KV REST API
excerpt: **get** `/accounts/{account_id}/storage/kv/namespaces` Returns the namespaces owned by an account. A human-readable string name for a Namespace. - `supports_url_encoding: optional boolean` True if keys written on the URL will be URL-decoded before storing. For example, if set to "true", a key written on the URL as "%3F" will be stored as "?". - `result_info: optional object { count, page, per_page, total_count }`
